mapper.select: SELECT ID, EDU_ID, WORDS_ID FROM TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP ORDER BY ID ASC
SELECT ID, EDU_ID, WORDS_ID FROM TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP WHERE EDU_ID = #{eduId} ORDER BY ID ASC
SELECT ID, EDU_ID, WORDS_ID FROM TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP WHERE WORDS_ID = #{wordsId} ORDER BY ID ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_EDU_WORD_MAP.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP(ID, EDU_ID, WORDS_ID) VALUES(#{id}, #{eduId}, #{wordsId})
